client_construction.code: cfg := sarama.NewConfig(); cfg.Producer.Return.Successes = true; p, err := sarama.NewSyncProducer([]string{brokers}, cfg); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: PublishEvent
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, _, err := p.producer.SendMessage(&sarama.ProducerMessage{Topic: topic, Value: sarama.ByteEncoder(payload)}); return err

code_style_notes: SyncProducer is blocking; use AsyncProducer for high-throughput pipelines
Producer.Return.Successes MUST be true for SyncProducer
